titleStmt.title: SII 9.279: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 279. (A.R. No. 546 of 1915.) ON A PILLAR IN THE MANDAPA OF THE PARVATESVARA TEMPLE AT NANDAVARAM, ADONI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1108, Parābhava, Pushya, śu. 13, Bṛihaspativāra, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkramaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1186 December 25 Thursday and refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Vīranārayaṇa-Sōmēśvaradēva ruling from Jayantīpura. His Daṇḍanāyaka, the brave Brahman Māḷapayya or Māḷaparasa, who was ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand is stated to have made a gift of one gadyāṇa per month out of the hejjuṅka collected in Guḍikallu twenty-four, for the service of the god Mallikārjuna in Nandāvura, after washing the feet of the teacher Indraśakti-Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājan paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ vīranārāyaṇaṁ
sōmēśvaradēvaru jayantīpurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire ta
tpādapadmōpajīvi © Aribhūbhaidbaḷabhaṁjanaṁ jananutōdyatkīrttilakṣmī
śvaraṁ varavaṁśaprabhavaṁ bhavastutapadāṁbhōjātasēvāparaṁ paramō
pāyacaturbhbhujaṁ bhujabaḷasvāyattasāmrājyasaukhyarataṁ māḷapadaṁḍanātha
nesevaṁ śrīboppadēvātmajaṁ . jayati madanarūpaḥ svāṁtavidyākaḷāpaḥ
sakaḷaguṇanidhānaḥ santatānūnadānaḥ budhajanavanacaitraḥ cārunīrē
janētraḥ pratihataripuyūthō māḷapō daṁḍanāthaḥ . Ākarṇnya pratiśabda
madriśikharē prōdyadguhābhyantarē prōdbhūtaṁ nikaṭasthakauśikamahā
gaṁbhīrahāradhvanaḥ . tadbhērīravaśaṁkayā prativasantyākaṁpitāṁgā vanē bhītā
māḷapadaṁḍanāthavijitāḥ pratyartthibhūpāḷakāḥ . pavanapathadantupāśri
takavirājananantanante bahubhōgadharaṁ divasakaranante tējōbhavanaṁ māḷapaca
mūpanesevaṁ dhareyoḷ . svasti samastapraśestisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāneṁ
sēnādhipati mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ niśśaṁkaṁ māḷaparasadaṁḍanāya
karu siṁdavāḍi sāsiramanāḷuttaviṟdu śakavarṣadinitta 1108 neya parābhavasaṁ
vatsarada puṣya sudda 13 brihaspativāradaṁdu UttarāyaNasaṁkrama
ṇanimittavāgi śrīmadagrahāraṁ naṁdāvurada śrīmallikārjunadē
vara naivēdyanaṁdādīvigege Eḷkōṭicakravartti sarbbajña mahāvādi triḷō
canadēvara siṣyarappa Ī sthānadācāryyaru Iṁdraśaktipaṁḍitadēvara kālaṁ
kaḷci dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi guḍikalla 24 ṟa sthaḷada hejjuṁkadalli tiṁgaḷtiṁ
gaḷiṁge koṭṭa gadyāṇa 1© svadattāddviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ
paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṟphalaṁ bhavēt . yō harati kaviraśaktaścō
ra Ivārthaṁ parēṇa kavinā dṛṣṭaṁ . taṁ hasati sukavipadmaprabhākarō bhāskaraḥ ku
kavimukhamudraḥ ©
Digital edition of SII 9.279 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
